[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010001111 5
1 1000111100 5
2 0101101010 5
3 0011110101 6
4 0111101011 7
5 1110111001 7
6 1101001011 6
7 1111111101 9

01 0101000100 3
12 0000000000 a
23 0000000010 1
34 0111110001 6
45 1000000000 1
56 0001101100 4
67 0100000010 2
70 1000110000 3

02 0000000100 1
13 0000000000 a
24 0111000011 5
35 1010010001 4
46 1000001000 2
57 0101001000 3
60 0000000010 1
71 1000110100 4

03 0000000100 1
14 0010000001 2
25 1010000011 4
36 1011111001 7
47 0000001000 1
50 0000100000 1
61 0100000010 2
72 0000110100 3

04 0111000100 4
15 0010000001 2
26 1011001001 5
37 0101001001 4
40 1000000000 1
51 0101100100 4
62 0000000000 a
73 0000000100 1

05 0010000000 1
16 0010001001 3
27 0101001011 5
30 1000110001 4
41 1000000000 1
52 0000100100 2
63 0000000010 1
74 0010110100 4

06 0011001100 4
17 0000001001 2
20 1000000011 3
31 1101110000 5
42 0000000000 a
53 0000000100 1
64 0100000010 2
75 1010010000 3

07 0101001000 3
10 0000000001 1
21 1101000010 4
32 0000110000 2
43 0000000000 a
54 0101100100 4
65 0000000010 1
76 1010110100 5
